common.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

landing.hero_subheading: Instant lessons, quizzes, and audio where available. Just learning.
landing.features_heading: A teacher can set their own study material using AI
landing.feature_instant_desc: Pre-generated lessons and quizzes load in milliseconds — no AI wait time.
landing.feature_audio_desc: Every lesson has a narrated audio version. Learn by reading or listening.
landing.feature_multilang_desc: Full content in three languages. Switch any time in settings.
landing.feature_offline_desc: Downloaded content is available without internet. Progress syncs automatically.
landing.feature_experiments_desc: Step-by-step activity guides with materials lists for hands-on learning.
landing.feature_schools_desc: Teachers get real-time progress reports, alerts, and custom curriculum tools.
landing.social_proof_heading: Trusted by students, teachers, and parents
landing.cta_subheading: Join thousands of students mastering their subjects.

pricing.heading: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.subheading: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.

demo.modal_description: Enter your email to get a 24-hour demo account. No credit card required.
